mapper.select: SELECT item_id, item_name, item_img FROM items WHERE item_name Like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY item_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fridge_item(user_id, item_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT item_id as itemId, item_name as itemName, item_img as itemImg FROM items WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
